about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A global youth movement aimed at empowering youth and building future leaders.
about.historyDesc: Founded in 1907, the original scouting movement transformed into the World Alfohod Scout and Guide over a century-long journey, with one goal: to leave the world better than we found it.
about.reportsDesc: We are committed to full transparency in all our work. Read our annual reports to learn more about our financial and community impact.

whatWeDo.title: What We Do
whatWeDo.subtitle: Our programs and initiatives are designed to develop youth skills and empower them.

academy.title: Al-Fahoud Academy
academy.subtitle: Learn. Lead. Inspire.
academy.heroDesc: An integrated educational platform offering training courses in various scouting areas to develop your skills and build leadership capacities.

features.title: Why the Academy?
features.subtitle: We designed a unique learning experience that meets the needs of scouts and leaders.

certs.title: Certified Certificates
certs.desc: Get certified completion certificates added to your scouting record.

experts.title: Expert Instructors
experts.desc: Learn directly from scouting leaders with years of field experience.

interactive.title: Interactive Content
interactive.desc: Visual, readable lessons and interactive tests ensure concept mastery.

academy.searchPlaceholder: Search for a course, skill, or topic...
academy.noCoursesDesc: We couldn't find any courses matching your search criteria. Try changing filters or search terms.
academy.beInstructorDesc: Share your scouting expertise with thousands of members. We are always looking for inspiring leaders.

hero.subtitle: A transformative educational community for youth worldwide. We are fast, focused, brave, and agile — just like the Cheetah.

pillars.title: Pillars of Scouting
pillars.subtitle: We don't just offer activities; we build a complete personality capable of facing future challenges.

leadership.title: Leadership & Influence
leadership.desc: We empower youth to take initiative and lead positive change in their communities through modern leadership skills.

community.title: Community Service
community.desc: We believe service is the core of scouting, working to foster volunteerism and good citizenship.

skills.title: Skill Development
skills.desc: Diverse training programs covering life, technical, and field skills to build a capable generation.

values.title: Values & Principles
values.desc: We instill global scouting values: honesty, loyalty, nobility, and human brotherhood.

store.subtitle: Get official uniforms, badges, and exclusive gear.

videos.subtitle: Watch success stories and adventures from around the world.

events.subtitle: Don't miss the chance to participate in the most important local and global events.

donate.title: Contribute to building future leaders
donate.subtitle: Your donation makes a real difference in the lives of thousands of young people around the world.

jamboree.desc: Join over 50,000 young people from around the world in an extraordinary experience to celebrate diversity, build friendships, and make memories that last a lifetime.

peopleOfDetermination.title3: People of Determination — Our Real Heroes
peopleOfDetermination.subtitle: At World Alfohod Scouting, we believe everyone — regardless of their abilities — deserves a complete scouting experience. We design our programs to be inclusive and empowering for every individual.
peopleOfDetermination.signLanguageDesc: Let's learn some basic words in Arabic Sign Language. Communication is a right for all.
peopleOfDetermination.signLanguageCertified: All our events include certified sign language interpreters
peopleOfDetermination.commitmentDesc: We have dedicated programs that respect individual needs, and a modified scouting curriculum that gives everyone a chance to grow and excel.

sign.title: Sign Language
sign.desc: All our programs are supported by certified sign language interpreters.

visual.title: Visual Accessibility
visual.desc: Screen reader compatible digital content and appropriate lighting.

hearing.title: Hearing Support
hearing.desc: Sound amplification devices and FM systems available at all events.

teams.title: Specialized Teams
teams.desc: Specially trained leaders to support people of determination.

join.title: Ready to start your scouting adventure?
join.subtitle: Join over 57 million scouts worldwide in a journey of self-discovery and community service.

library.title: Resources & Library
library.subtitle: Discover scouting guides, educational materials, and professional reports.
library.noResults: No resources found matching your search.
